title: Crispy Chicken Burger
description: A spicy twist on the classic burger, topped with crispy chicken and creamy sauce.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium-high heat.
2. Season the chicken breast with salt, pepper, and any other desired spices.
3. Cook the chicken in the skillet for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
4. Meanwhile, toast the hamburger buns on the skillet or in a toaster.
5. Cook the spicy burger patties according to package instructions.

6. Assemble the burgers by spreading creamy sauce on the bottom bun, followed by a cooked patty, a few slices of lettuce, a tomato slice, a cheese slice, a few pickle slices, and finally the chicken breast.
